title: Malaysian Shrimp Noodle Stir Fry
description: A fast and flavorful stir fry made with shrimp, noodles, and Malaysian spices. Perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: snappy vegetables (such as carrots and bell peppers)

instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes, until pink and just cooked through.
Add the snappy vegetables and cook for 2-3 minutes, until tender.
Add the sweet Malaysian sauce, soy sauce, honey, and lime juice. Stir to combine.
Add the noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce and vegetables.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the noodles are heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with sliced lime and chopped cilantro if desired.
Optional: Add some heat to the dish with a few dashes of sriracha or red pepper flakes.
